original_image_tags: A typewritten report page, MDT form 000.9, with two punched holes at the top. The page lists detailed observations of an unidentified flying object. There is a stamped date at the bottom right.

elements.description: Page containing a typed government report regarding 'Unidentified Flying Objects' (MDT 000.9), listing details about an observation of one object at a distance of twenty miles. Includes typed annotations 'DEC 13 3:23 PM 48' and '10V29W116D' at the bottom.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page is a typed report with no distinct visual content (photographs, sketches, etc.), making them consistent on the absence of imagery.
